steps: Go to https://app.convertkit.com and sign in or create an account
Click your name or avatar in the top-right corner and select 'Settings'
Navigate to 'Developer' in the left sidebar (or go to https://app.convertkit.com/account_settings/advanced_settings)
Click 'Add a new key' and enter a descriptive name for your key
Copy the generated API key immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your ConvertKit V4 API key, used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: ConvertKit has rebranded to Kit — the API domain remains api.convertkit.com
The V4 API is the current version and is recommended; V3 still works but is no longer in active development
The API key is shown only once at creation — save it immediately
A free plan is available with basic functionality; paid plans unlock higher subscriber limits
The key is sent as: Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve authenticated account details to verify the API key is valid
